title: CLV / CAC Ratio Calculator
premiumFeatures: Benchmarking against industry standards (WERC, Lean Six Sigma)

inputs.label: Average Order Value (AOV)
inputs.businessContext: Mean revenue per transaction. Used in CLV calculation. Typical range: $20-$200 for B2C, $500-$5000 for B2B.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mean revenue per transaction. Used in CLV calculation. Typical range: $20-$200 for B2C, $500-$5000 for B2B.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşlem başına ortalama gelir. CLV hesaplamasında kullanılır. Tipik aralık: B2C için $20-$200, B2B için $500-$5000.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mittlerer Umsatz pro Transaktion. Wird bei der CLV-Berechnung verwendet. Typischer Bereich: 20-200 $ für B2C, 500-5000 $ für B2B.

inputs.label: Purchase Frequency per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of purchases per customer per year. Derived from historical data or cohort analysis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of purchases per customer per year. Derived from historical data or cohort analysis.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşteri başına yıllık satın alma sayısı. Geçmiş verilerden veya kohort analizinden elde edilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Käufe pro Kunde pro Jahr. Abgeleitet aus historischen Daten oder Kohortenanalyse.

inputs.label: Customer Lifetime (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Average retention period. For subscription models, use 1/churn rate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average retention period. For subscription models, use 1/churn rate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ortalama elde tutma süresi. Abonelik modelleri için 1/kayıp oranı kullanın.

inputs.label: Gross Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Profit margin after COGS. Typical range: 30-70% for product businesses, 60-90% for SaaS.

businessContext_i18n.en: Profit margin after COGS. Typical range: 30-70% for product businesses, 60-90% for SaaS.
businessContext_i18n.tr: SMM sonrası kar marjı. Tipik aralık: Ürün işletmeleri için %30-70, SaaS için %60-90.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewinnspanne nach COGS. Typischer Bereich: 30-70% für Produktunternehmen, 60-90% für SaaS.

inputs.label: Total Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of all marketing and sales costs divided by number of new customers. Includes ad spend, salaries, tools.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of all marketing and sales costs divided by number of new customers. Includes ad spend, salaries, tools.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm pazarlama ve satış maliyetlerinin yeni müşteri sayısına bölünmesi. Reklam harcamaları, maaşlar, araçlar dahildir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe aller Marketing- und Vertriebskosten geteilt durch Anzahl Neukunden. Enthält Werbeausgaben, Gehälter, Tools.

inputs.label: Annual Retention Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of customers retained year over year. Used for churn adjustment. Industry benchmark: 60-90%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of customers retained year over year. Used for churn adjustment. Industry benchmark: 60-90%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıldan yıla elde tutulan müşteri yüzdesi. Kayıp düzeltmesi için kullanılır. Sektör referansı: %60-90.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Kunden, die Jahr für Jahr gehalten werden. Zur Abwanderungsanpassung. Branchenbenchmark: 60-90%.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (Annual)
inputs.businessContext: Cost of capital or required rate of return. Typical range: 8-15%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of capital or required rate of return. Typical range: 8-15%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sermaye maliyeti veya gerekli getiri oranı. Tipik aralık: %8-15.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kapitalkosten oder erforderliche Rendite. Typischer Bereich: 8-15%.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective assessment of input data reliability. Low = estimates, High = audited data.

businessContext_i18n.en: Subjective assessment of input data reliability. Low = estimates, High = audited data.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliğine ilişkin öznel değerlendirme. Düşük = tahminler, Yüksek = denetlenmiş veri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Subjektive Bewertung der Zuverlässigkeit der Eingabedaten. Niedrig = Schätzungen, Hoch = geprüfte Daten.

rules.message: CAC must be greater than zero.
Average order value must be positive.
Gross margin must be between 0 and 100.
Retention rate must be between 0 and 100.
Discount rate must be between 0 and 50.
Customer lifetime must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: CLV/CAC ratio below 3:1 indicates potential inefficiency. Below 1:1 means negative ROI.
Payback period >12 months may strain cash flow. >24 months is critical.
Annual churn >10% is above average. >20% is critical for SaaS.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
